' Byggstyrning IFC open-import journal
' Generated by Run-ByggPipelineSetup.ps1 -- do not edit manually.
'
' Strategy: Reuse the proven ID_IFC_LINK mechanism to trigger Revit's
' IFC-to-RVT conversion.  When Revit links an IFC file, it creates
' (or updates) a .ifc.RVT cache file next to the IFC source.  This
' cache IS a full Revit document with imported geometry -- exactly
' what we need.
'
' The host project (with the link reference) is discarded; the real
' output is the .ifc.RVT cache file.
'
' Why not ID_REVIT_FILE_OPEN?  It opens Revit's AFileNavDialog
' (custom UI), which doesn't accept the standard Jrn.Data "FileDialog"
' format.  ID_IFC_LINK uses a standard Windows FileDialog.
'
' Placeholders replaced at runtime:
'   {{IFC_FILE_PATH}}      Absolute path to the .ifc file
'   {{IFC_FILENAME}}       Basename of the .ifc file
'   {{LINK_HOST_RVT_PATH}} Throwaway host project (discarded after run)
'   {{REVIT_VERSION}}      e.g. 2025.000

Dim Jrn
Set Jrn = CrsJournalScript

' --- Startup directives (must match Revit version) -----------------------
Jrn.Directive  _
        "CategoryDisciplineFilter"  , 63
Jrn.Directive  _
        "DisciplineOption"  , 32253
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "StayOnModifyInProject" , 0
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "StayOnModifyInFamily" , 1
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "ActiveCtOnSelection" , 1
Jrn.Data  _
        "JournalDefaultTemplate"  , "Metric Multi-discipline=$AllUsersAppData\Templates\English\Default-Multi-Discipline_Metric.rte"
Jrn.Data  _
        "JournalDefaultViewDiscipline"  , "Coordination"
Jrn.Directive  _
        "Version"  , "{{REVIT_VERSION}}" , "2.179"

' --- Create new empty Metric project (no template) -----------------------
  Jrn.Command "Ribbon"  , "Create a new project , ID_FILE_NEW_CHOOSE_TEMPLATE"
    Jrn.ComboBox "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "Control_Revit_TemplateCombo"  _
              , "SelEndOk"  , "<None>"
    Jrn.ComboBox "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "Control_Revit_TemplateCombo"  _
              , "Select"  , "<None>"
    Jrn.PushButton "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "OK, IDOK"
    Jrn.Data  _
            "TaskDialogResult"  , "Which system of measurement do you want to use in your project?" ,  _
             "Metric"  _
            , "1002"

' --- Synchronization: project creation transaction must complete ----------
  Jrn.Data  _
          "Transaction Successful"  , "Create Type Previews"

' --- Invoke Revit's native IFC Link command directly ---------------------
  Jrn.RibbonEvent "TabActivated:Insert"
  Jrn.Command "Ribbon"  , "Link an IFC file for reference , ID_IFC_LINK"

' --- IFC file dialog (standard Revit FileDialog) -------------------------
  Jrn.Data  _
          "FileDialog"  , "IDOK" , "{{IFC_FILE_PATH}}"  _
          , "ifc" , "{{IFC_FILENAME}}" , "{{IFC_FILENAME}}"
  Jrn.Data  _
          "FileType"  , "IFC Files (*.ifc)"
  Jrn.Data  _
          "Import IFC Intent"  , "1"
  Jrn.Data  _
          "Import IFC AutoJoin"  , "0"
  Jrn.Data  _
          "Import IFC Correct Off Axis"  , "0"

' --- Synchronization: first-time link creates the .ifc.RVT cache ---------
' "Open IFC Reference File" fires when there is no pre-existing .ifc.RVT.
' Since we copy the IFC to a fresh temp dir, this always happens here.
  Jrn.Data  _
          "Transaction Successful"  , "Open IFC Reference File"

' --- Synchronization: then the link transaction completes -----------------
  Jrn.Data  _
          "Transaction Successful"  , "Link IFC File"

' --- Save the host project (throwaway, just so Revit exits cleanly) ------
  Jrn.Command "Ribbon"  , "Save the active project , ID_REVIT_FILE_SAVE"
  Jrn.Data  _
          "File Name"  , "IDOK" , "{{LINK_HOST_RVT_PATH}}"

' --- Synchronization: save triggers link path relativization --------------
  Jrn.Data  _
          "Transaction Successful"  , "Relativize links"

' --- Exit Revit -----------------------------------------------------------
  Jrn.Command "Internal"  , "Quit the application; prompts to save projects , ID_APP_EXIT"
